#Lebanon’s Health Ministry said an #Israeli #strike on Deir Qanoun Al-Nahr in Tyre killed 10 people, including children and women, and injured three others. Separately, large-scale demolitions were reported near the border in southern Lebanon.  #KUNA #KUWAIT

#US #CENTCOM said the US is ready for #military action if talks with Iran fail, with a maritime blockade already in place and 88 ships turned away. It added that Iran’s missile, #drone, and proxy capabilities have been significantly degraded.  #KUNA #KUWAIT

#US Secretary of State will attend the #NATO Foreign Ministers Meeting in #Sweden to discuss defense spending and burden-sharing, and meet Arctic partners and senior Swedish officials. He will then visit #India to hold talks on energy #security, #trade, and defense cooperation.  #KUNA #KUWAIT

#US Central Command #CENTCOM said 88 vessels in the #StraitHormuz were redirected since the start of a US blockade on #Iranian #ports, with four intercepted. It added that #USforces remain deployed amid heightened tensions with #Iran.  #KUNA #KUWAIT
